seed_problem: Build a connected relay network where no node has degree > 3, minimizing total cable length; checker validates connectivity+degree and scores baseline/cost.
mutation: output-restriction: keep the min-cost connected-network goal but impose a per-node contact cap b_i in {2,3}, turning MST into an NP-hard degree-constrained minimum spanning structure; skinned as a pandemic contact-tracing backbone.
title: Pandemic Contact-Net: Degree-Capped Tracing Backbone
strategies: Morton/Z-order chain (space-filling curve) baseline connecting nodes in curve order
degree-constrained MST-style construction plus tree edge-swap local search that exploits the extra degree-3 branching
flow/rounding or metaheuristic refinements on a degree-constrained spanning tree
